Normal Attacks.name: Standing Heavy Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: Moves forward. June 2025 patch: reduced pusback on hit/block.

Normal Attacks.name: Standing Heavy Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: Knockdown crumple +61 on Punish Counter, limited juggle state. Strike invincible on frame 13.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Medium Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: 20% damage scaling to followup combo hits.

Target Combos.name: Light Kick, Light Kick, Light Kick (Hien Ren Kyaku)
Target Combos.notes: Third hit goes into an airborn state that can cancel into Musasabi no Mai (QCB+P).

Target Combos.name: Back + Heavy Kick, Heavy Kick
Target Combos.notes: Limited juggle state, can follow up with Hishou Ryuuenjin in the corner.

Special Moves.name: Kachousen (Light Punch)
Special Moves.on_hit: Normal -1..., Charged +1..., Followup +25... Flame +1..., Charged +1..., Followup +25...
Special Moves.on_block: Normal -7..., Charged -1..., Followup +21... Flame -3..., Charged -1..., Followup +21...
Special Moves.notes: Not technically considered a projectile, so does not collide with projectiles and can be stopped with normal attacks. Can hold the attack button to charge, and the held version is considered a projectile. Held version bounces off the opponent on hit/block for a followup hit, strength of Punch changes the bounce height. The Flame Stock version is a standard projectile with two hits. As of March 2026 patch: on-hit / on-block of full charge bounce hit from +30 to +25 / +26 to +21.

Special Moves.name: Kachousen (Medium Punch)
Special Moves.on_hit: Normal -3..., Charged +1..., Followup +25... Flame -1..., Charged +1..., Followup +25...
Special Moves.on_block: Normal -9..., Charged -1..., Followup +21... Flame -5..., Charged -1..., Followup +21...
Special Moves.notes: Not technically considered a projectile, so does not collide with projectiles and can be stopped with normal attacks. Can hold the attack button to charge, and the held version is considered a projectile. Held version bounces off the opponent on hit/block for a followup hit, strength of Punch changes the bounce height. The Flame Stock version is a standard projectile with two hits. As of March 2026 patch: on-hit / on-block of full charge bounce hit from +30 to +25 / +26 to +21.

Special Moves.name: Kachousen (Heavy Punch)
Special Moves.on_hit: Normal -5..., Charged +1..., Followup +25... Flame -3..., Charged +1..., Followup +25...
Special Moves.on_block: Normal -11..., Charged -1..., Followup +21... Flame -7..., Charged -1..., Followup +21...
Special Moves.notes: Not technically considered a projectile, so does not collide with projectiles and can be stopped with normal attacks. Can hold the attack button to charge, and the held version is considered a projectile. Held version bounces off the opponent on hit/block for a followup hit, strength of Punch changes the bounce height. The Flame Stock version is a standard projectile with two hits. As of March 2026 patch: on-hit / on-block of full charge bounce hit from +30 to +25 / +26 to +21.

Special Moves.name: Kachousen (Overdrive)
Special Moves.on_hit: Normal +3..., Charged +14..., Followup +25... (Knockdown +61) Flame +3..., Charged +46..., Followup +25... (Knockdown +60)
Special Moves.on_block: Normal -7..., Charged -1..., Followup +21... Flame -3..., Charged -1..., Followup +21...
Special Moves.notes: Overdrive version bounces off of opponents on hit/block for a followup hit without needing to be held. Overdrive version is always considered a standard projectile, but only has one hit so will lose to most other Overdrive projectiles. Can hold the attack button to charge. Held version has two hits, but does not bounce off of opponents on hit/block -- however, held version can be followed up with Forward+Punch to throw two more fans, both of which will bounce off of opponents on hit/block. Flame Stock versions still have two hits per fan. As of March 2026 patch: on-hit / on-block of full charge bounce hit from +30 to +25 / +26 to +21.

Special Moves.name: Hishou Ryuuenjin (Light Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Anti-air invincible on frames 1-14. Flame Stock version in parenthesis.

Special Moves.name: Hishou Ryuuenjin (Medium Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Anti-air invincible on frames 1-10. Flame Stock version in parenthesis.

Special Moves.name: Hishou Ryuuenjin (Heavy Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Anti-air invincible on frames 1-11. Flame Stock version in parenthesis.

Special Moves.name: Hishou Ryuuenjin (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-8. Anti-air invincible on frames 9-10. Flame Stock version in parenthesis.

Special Moves.name: Ryuuenbu (Heavy Punch)
Special Moves.on_hit: Limited Juggle State, Knockdown +43...+51 (Limited Juggle State, Knockdown +47...)
Special Moves.notes: Whiffs on crouching opponents. Limited juggle state on hit.

Special Moves.name: Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Transitions into an air state on hit, during which Jump Medium Punch can be used as a followup. Flame Stock in parenthesis.

Special Moves.name: Musasabi no Mai (During Forward Jump Only)
Special Moves.on_hit: Limited juggle state, knockdown ** on hit...
Special Moves.notes: Punch strength does not change the move. Overdrive in parenthesis. Flame Stock in brackets. All versions create a limited juggle on hit, but difficult to space to allow followup without Overdrive, which launches higher.

Super Arts.name: Kagerou no Mai (Level 1)
Super Arts.notes: Strike invincible on frames 1-8. Breaks armor. Flame stock in parenthesis.

Super Arts.name: Chou Hissatsu Shinobi Bachi (Level 2)
Super Arts.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-8. Breaks armor. Flame Stock in parenthesis. Flame stock grants additional projectile invincibility on frames 9-12.

Super Arts.name: Shiranui Ryuu: Enbu Ada Zakura (Level 3)
Super Arts.notes: Strike invincibile on frames 1-11. Breaks armor. Critical Art in parenthesis.
